state.next-action: Phase 00 — install deps + verify API keys. Run: pip install deepgram-sdk groq elevenlabs sounddevice python-dotenv. Write .env with DEEPGRAM_API_KEY=07101d289c209b4af367aef6c517e640c5493079 + GROQ_API_KEY + ELEVENLABS_API_KEY. Smoke-test each API with a 3-line script. Then CONDUIT-PROJ-T-01-01 (project skeleton).

state-log.entry: AEC integrated: pyaec/speexdsp backend processes every mic chunk against decoded TTS reference before Deepgram sees it. ~20 dB ERLE measured on round-trip test. Decision D-017 captures the audio-layer fix rationale. Time gate retained as belt-and-suspenders for the first few convergence frames.

Phase 04 (Robustness pass) closed — 6 tasks done covering multi-word LLM trigger, ElevenLabs free-tier repair, user-initiated barge-in, echo guard against bot self-interruption, runtime-entrypoint cleanup, README polish. Decisions D-013 (TTS free-tier config), D-014 (barge threshold rationale), D-015 (echo guard heuristic) recorded.
Part 2 (crosstalk) implementation complete. Speculative threshold 250ms, settled 600ms. Manual smoke pending.
Part 1 implementation complete — TUI conversation loop wires Deepgram STT + OpenRouter/Groq LLM + ElevenLabs TTS with unified JSONL char store. Manual smoke test pending operator env var paste.

Phase 00 — install deps + verify API keys. From conduit_proj/ run: pip install deepgram-sdk groq elevenlabs sounddevice python-dotenv numpy. Write .env: DEEPGRAM_API_KEY=07101d289c209b4af367aef6c517e640c5493079 + GROQ_API_KEY + ELEVENLABS_API_KEY. Smoke each: 3-line test per API. Then start CONDUIT-PROJ-T-01-01. Use 'gad snapshot --projectid conduit_proj' (underscore registered, hyphen used in entity IDs only). Test brief in .planning/PROJECT.md.
Test started 2026-05-15 ~12:35 local. 2.5h timer. Part 1 mandatory, Part 2 stretch. Share with GitHub user RioPopper. 00 credit cap. Stack: Python + Deepgram + Groq + ElevenLabs.
